title: Argentinian Snapper Parrillada
description: A flavorful and spicy grilled snapper dish from Argentina, typically served with a side of chimichurri sauce.
instructions: Rinse the snapper fillets and pat dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together Argentinian seasoning, lemon juice, garlic, and parrillada seasoning.
Brush the mixture evenly onto both sides of the snapper fillets.
Drizzle olive oil over the snapper fillets.
Season with dense salt to taste.
Grill the snapper for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the snapper to a plate and garnish with fresh parsley.
